nt of Rahu in Libra gives chances for long travels and
learning many talents. From 40-41, he will have great improvement in status
and he will earn name and fame. Between 40-50, he will visit foreign
countries and will be able to own a beautiful house. He will have 2-5 children
and will live upto a good old age of76 years.
CHART 201
In this chart, the Sun in Virgo has exchange of places with Mercury in
Leo. Mercury is with Mars and the Moon. As a result the native's father was
employed in Government service as an accountant.
\
As for the native, Mars and Mercury will cut down his educational
career, but the exchange of places between the Sun and Mercury will give the
native another chance for completing his education.

134 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
Female native will have some
trouble in married life on account of Sat Dt
the Moon-Mercury combination.
More.over, Mars is inimical to Mer Jupt
cury. Hence, her relationship with her
husband will not be happy, as it is Mer.
